mapper.select: SELECT encounter.id AS encounter_id, encounter.order_id AS registration_id, encounter.doctor_id, encounter.patient_id AS patient_user_id, patient.display_name AS patient_name, pp.gender, encounter.department_id, department.name AS department_name, session.session_date, session.period_code, encounter.encounter_status, encounter.started_at, encounter.ended_at, pp.birth_date FROM visit_encounter encounter JOIN registration_order registration ON registration.id = encounter.order_id JOIN clinic_session session ON session.id = registration.session_id JOIN users patient ON patient.id = encounter.patient_id JOIN departments department ON department.id = encounter.department_id LEFT JOIN patient_profile pp ON pp.user_id = encounter.patient_id AND pp.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE encounter.deleted_at IS NULL AND registration.deleted_at IS NULL AND session.deleted_at IS NULL AND patient.deleted_at IS NULL AND department.deleted_at IS NULL AND encounter.id = #{encounterId}

SELECT encounter.id AS encounter_id, registration.source_ai_session_id AS session_id, session.summary AS structured_summary, run.id AS model_run_id, event.risk_level, run.triage_snapshot_json FROM visit_encounter encounter JOIN registration_order registration ON registration.id = encounter.order_id JOIN ai_session session ON session.id = registration.source_ai_session_id JOIN ai_turn turn ON turn.session_id = session.id JOIN ai_model_run run ON run.turn_id = turn.id JOIN ai_guardrail_event event ON event.run_id = run.id WHERE encounter.deleted_at IS NULL AND registration.deleted_at IS NULL AND session.deleted_at IS NULL AND turn.deleted_at IS NULL AND run.deleted_at IS NULL AND encounter.id = #{encounterId} AND turn.turn_status = 'COMPLETED' AND run.run_status = 'SUCCEEDED' AND run.triage_snapshot_json IS NOT NULL ORDER BY turn.turn_no DESC, run.completed_at DESC, run.id DESC, event.occurred_at DESC, event.id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT chunk_id, retrieval_rank, fusion_score, snippet FROM ai_run_citation WHERE model_run_id = #{modelRunId} ORDER BY retrieval_rank ASC, id ASC
